title: Naa Onnu Ninaicha(Peechankai) Lyrics Peechankai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Naa Onnu Ninaicha conveys a lively and playful vibe, celebrating the joy of life and relationships.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Peechankai, the song showcases moments of fun and excitement, reflecting the carefree spirit of the characters.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Anthonydasan and composed by Balamurali Balu.

When was the song released?

Naa Onnu Ninaicha was released on March 5, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Naa Onnu Ninaicha, the lively beats and catchy lyrics encapsulate the essence of celebration and joy. The song plays a pivotal role in Peechankai, highlighting moments of carefree fun among the characters. With Anthonydasan's energetic vocals, it evokes feelings of happiness and excitement. This track is perfect for parties and celebrations, making it a memorable addition to the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naa Onnu Ninaicha from Peechankai is a vibrant track that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and energy. With Anthonydasan's dynamic vocals and Balamurali Balu's catchy composition, this song is sure to get you moving. Dive into the rhythmic beats and let the infectious vibe of this song elevate your spirits!
stanzaMeanings: I thought of one thing, hey you think of one too, like Sendhil, I just want to be like Koundamani, you keep running away.
Hey, the ghostly hand will reveal what it knows, like a snake from heaven, my time will come with that hand.
Wherever I go, who has set the path? A good song is in the middle, who has placed it?
Raising my hand, Saniyo has placed it, the hand is raised, and the fortune has come.
Like Temple Run, my life is now like Candy Crush, I request with my hand.
Hey lefty boy, you gotta have a crazy hand because of this fun and joy that came for me - now thinking of one thing, doing one thing, come on, sing a song, boom.
I thought of one thing, hey you think of one too, like Sendhil, I just want to be like Koundamani, you keep running away.
Hey, the ghostly hand will reveal what it knows, like a snake from heaven, my time will come with that hand.
